title: Nostra Core Knowledge Graph Ontology
description: Minimal Nostra-native ontology for graph semantics, provenance scopes, and Space-local extension control.

classes.description: Sovereign container for policies, contributions, and knowledge bundles.
Governed unit of knowledge, work, or evidence that can be linked and versioned.
Typed link between two governed graph subjects.
A declared ability or feature exposed by a Space or contribution surface.
Named graph scope used to partition evidence and traversal.

relations.description: A Contribution relates to another Contribution.
A Contribution is scoped by a ProvenanceScope.

properties.description: Authority ceiling for a bundled artifact or query.

extension_rules: Space-local vocabularies must use a namespace prefix and may add only additive terms.
Core terms are immutable without steward-approved breaking-change review.
A custom Space vocabulary must not redefine the semantics of Space, Contribution, Relation, Capability, or ProvenanceScope.
